subject: Letter of Offer — Ground Investigation Term Contract
body: We are pleased to submit our offer to self-perform the ground investigation package. Our offer is based on the attached priced schedule of rates and the scope of works set out below. This letter and the attached schedule together constitute our offer, which the undersigned is authorised to make on behalf of the company.
inclusions: Mobilisation and demobilisation of the drilling rig.
Rotary drilling through soil and rock as scheduled.
In-situ standard penetration testing and undisturbed sampling.
exclusions: Utility diversions and any resulting rig standing time beyond the contingency allowance.
Value Added Tax or equivalent, where applicable.
assumptions: Rates hold for 90 days from the date of this letter.
Continuous and unobstructed access to all borehole positions.
Quantities are provisional and subject to remeasurement at the tendered rates.
Works proceed during normal working hours.
